# Get the timeline
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"v2/timeline","params":[]}' |jq .
# Get the number of records
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"v2/count","params":{}}' |jq .
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"v2/count","params":{"duration":"1h"}}' |jq .
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"v2/count","params":{"start_ts":1776978000,"end_ts":1776985000}}' |jq .
# Primaries
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"v2/primaries","params":{}}' |jq .
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"v2/primaries","params":{"duration":"30m"}}' |jq .
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"v2/primaries","params":{"start_ts":1776978000,"end_ts":1776985000}}' |jq .
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"v2/primary","params":{"primary_id":"019dbca3-179c-7e72-bb86-000cd452e2d8"}}' |jq .
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"v2/primaries.get","params":{"session": "1", "key": "queue.depth", "duration": "4h"},"id":1}' |jq .
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"v2/primaries.get.telemetry","params":{"session": "1", "key": "queue.depth", "duration": "4h"},"id":1}' |jq .
# Secondaries
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"v2/secondaries","params":{"primary_id":"019dbca3-179c-7e72-bb86-000cd452e2d8"}}' |jq .
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"v2/secondary","params":{"secondary_id":"019dbca3-1daf-7160-b81a-f1652ed62d34"}}' |jq .
# Keys
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"v2/keys.all","params":{"session": "1", "duration": "24h", "key": "http*"},"id":1}' |jq .
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"v2/keys.all","params":{"session": "1", "duration": "24h"},"id":1}' |jq .
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"v2/keys","params":{"duration":"1h"}}' |jq .
# Duplicates
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"v2/duplicates","params":{},"id":1}' |jq .
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"v2/duplicates","params":{"duration":"1h"}}' |jq .
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"v2/duplicates","params":{"start_ts":1776978000,"end_ts":1776985000}}' |jq .
# Shards
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"v2/shards","params":{},"id":1}' |jq .
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"v2/shards","params":{"duration":"1h"}}' |jq .
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"v2/shards","params":{"start_ts":1776978000,"end_ts":1776985000}}' |jq .
# Add
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"v2/add","params":{"doc":{"timestamp":1745042040,"key":"server.cpu","data":81.3}},"id":1}' |jq .
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"v2/add.batch","params":{"docs":[{"timestamp":1745042000,"key":"server.cpu","data":87.3},{"timestamp":1745042001,"key":"server.mem","data":4096}]}
# Eval
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"v2/eval","params":{"context": "1", "script": "2 40 + ." },"id":1}' |jq .
# Fulltext
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"v2/fulltext","params":{"session": "1", "duration": "24h", "query": "sshd OR ftpd" },"id":1}' |jq .
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"v2/fulltext.get","params":{"session": "1", "duration": "24h", "query": "sshd OR ftpd" },"id":1}' |jq .
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"v2/fulltext.recent","params":{"session": "1", "duration": "24h", "query": "sshd OR ftpd", "limit": 2 },"id":1}' |jq .
# Search
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"v2/search","params":{"session": "1", "duration": "24h", "query": "Tell me about traffic from 45.54.187.220", "limit": 2 },"id":1}' |jq .
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"v2/search.get","params":{"session": "1", "duration": "24h", "query": "Tell me about traffic from 45.54.187.220", "limit": 2 },"id":1}' |jq .
# Keys
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"v2/keys","params":{"session": "1", "duration": "24h"},"id":1}' |jq .
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"v2/keys.get","params":{"session": "1", "duration": "24h", "key": "* /metrics"},"id":1}' |jq .
# Topics
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"v2/topics","params":{"session": "1", "duration": "30m", "key": "ConnectionError"},"id":1}' |jq .
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"v2/topics.all","params":{"session": "1", "duration": "30m"},"id":1}' |jq .
# Explore primaries
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"v2/primaries.explore","params":{"session": "1", "duration": "12h"},"id":1}' |jq .
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"v2/primaries.explore.telemetry","params":{"session": "1", "duration": "4h"},"id":1}' |jq .
# Trends
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"v2/trends","params":{"session": "1", "key": "queue.depth", "duration": "4h"},"id":1}' |jq .
# Status
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9000 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"v2/status","params":{},"id":1}' |jq .
